notes_amp_compile_mutually_exclusive: M4_FP32: torch.compile(model) + memory_opt_scatter/conv2d + GPU voxel preprocess + compile_voxelizer; use generous --warmup (dynamo + compiled voxelizer).
M4_AMP: autocast(fp16) + memory_opt_scatter/conv2d + GPU voxel preprocess + compile_voxelizer; no torch.compile on model (per matrix).
